mapper.sql: A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT

, B.SBOARD_TYPE_NM AS SBOARD_TYPE_NM , C.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_NM AS SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_NM , D.SUSE_TYPE_NM AS SUSE_TYPE_NM , E.SUSER_NM AS SCREATE_NM , (CASE WHEN STRPOS( E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@') >4 THEN SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ))-2 ) || '***@' || SPLIT_PART(E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) ELSE SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 )) ) || '*@' || SPLIT_PART(E.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) END ) AS SCREATE_EMAIL , F.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM , (CASE WHEN STRPOS( F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@') >4 THEN SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ))-2 ) || '***@' || SPLIT_PART(F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) ELSE SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 )) ) || '*@' || SPLIT_PART(F.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) END ) AS SMODIFY_EMAIL
, A.SBOARD_TYPE_NM , A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_NM , A.SUSE_TYPE_NM , A.SCREATE_NM , A.SCREATE_EMAIL , A.SMODIFY_NM , A.SMODIFY_EMAIL
, MST.TB_BOARD_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_BOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD C , MST.TB_USE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_USER_BAS E , MST.TB_USER_BAS F

AND A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD = B.SBOARD_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD = C.SBOARD_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD = C.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD(+) AND A.SUSE_TYPE_CD = D.SUSE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SCREATE_ID = E.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = F.SUSER_ID(+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_BOARD A
ORDER BY A.SEQ DESC

SELECT , A.NREPLY_CNT , A.RNUM FROM ( SELECT
, A.NREPLY_CNT , ROWNUM RNUM FROM ( SELECT
, A.NREPLY_CNT FROM (SELECT A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT , COUNT (B.SEQ) AS NREPLY_CNT FROM MST.TB_BOARD A , MST.TB_BOARD_REPLY B WHERE A.SEQ = B.SEQ(+) GROUP BY A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT ) A
ORDER BY A.SEQ DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} )A WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM (SELECT A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT , COUNT (B.SEQ) AS NREPLY_CNT FROM MST.TB_BOARD A , MST.TB_BOARD_REPLY B WHERE A.SEQ = B.SEQ(+) GROUP BY A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT ) A
mapper.update:
UPDATE
MST.TB_BOARD A SET NREAD_CNT = NREAD_CNT + 1
mapper.select:
SELECT
A.SORT , A.SEQ , A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD , A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD , A.SBOARD_TITLE , REPLACE(REPLACE(SBOARD_CONTENTS,CHR(13),' '),CHR(10), ' ') AS SBOARD_CONTENTS , A.DNOTI_START_DT , A.DNOTI_END_DT , A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT
FROM (SELECT '1' AS SORT ,A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT FROM MST.TB_BOARD A WHERE SBOARD_TYPE_CD = 'BH0001' AND SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD = 'BM0002' AND DNOTI_START_DT <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DNOTI_END_DT >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UNION SELECT '2' AS SORT , MM.SEQ, MM.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, MM.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, MM.SBOARD_TITLE , MM.SBOARD_CONTENTS, MM.DNOTI_START_DT, MM.DNOTI_END_DT, MM.SUSE_TYPE_CD , MM.DCREATE_DT, MM.SCREATE_ID, MM.DMODIFY_DT, MM.SMODIFY_ID , MM.NREAD_CNT FROM (SELECT A.SEQ, A.SBOARD_TYPE_CD, A.SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD, A.SBOARD_TITLE , A.SBOARD_CONTENTS, A.DNOTI_START_DT, A.DNOTI_END_DT, A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NREAD_CNT FROM MST.TB_BOARD A WHERE SBOARD_TYPE_CD = 'BH0001' AND SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD = 'BM0001'
ORDER BY DMODIFY_DT DESC LIMIT 5 ) MM ORDER BY SORT ASC, DMODIFY_DT DESC LIMIT 5 ) A
WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.SORT ASC , A.DMODIFY_DT DESC
